positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial fox spirit (kitsune) standing gracefully among abstract clouds. The fox should have a sleek, glowing silhouette with translucent edges, rendered in deep midnight blue and radiant gold accents. The composition is centered and vertical, suggesting power and mystical calm. Include abstract star constellations forming subtle patterns in the background and delicate, glowing cherry blossom petals falling gently. The style should be a blend of Art Deco elegance and Japanese Sumi-e ink wash techniques, with perfect symmetry and strong graphic contrast. Highly detailed vector art quality, suitable for screen printing on fabric, flat lay, no visible gradients or excessive photorealism.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noisy, text, watermarks, logo, trademark, writing, bad anatomy, extra limbs, extra fingers, poor composition, low detail, grain, gradient, photorealistic, bokeh, depth of field
